creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
❌ this is NOT the best place to get smørrebrød in Copenhagen, but the food is still very tasty and I think this tiny cafè is one of the last places in the city centre of Copenhagen where you can get a local vibe and you don’t have to pay an exorbitant amount of money for a piece of rye bread and a beer 🤠

📍Cafè Halvvejen 

Follow @destination_wellknown for more Copenhagen content 🇩🇰
